basic_details.job_title: Delhi Public Library Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 02 Senior Library & Information Officer and Asstt. Library & Information Officer Posts
basic_details.post_name: Senior Library & Information Officer (SLIO) and Asstt. Library & Information Officer (Braille)
basic_details.short_information: Delhi Public Library (DPL) Senior Library & Information Officer (SLIO) and Assistant Library & Information Officer (Braille) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website dpl.gov.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the Delhi Public Library Recruitment 2026.

important_dates.raw: Starting Date: 27 June 2026 Last Date for Receipt of Applications: Within 45 days from the date of publication of the notification.

qualification.education_qualification: As per post requirements (Library & Information Science)
qualification.details: Qualification: Candidates must possess the required educational qualifications and experience in Library & Information Science as per the detailed notification. Age Limit: As prescribed in the recruitment rules for respective posts.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-12 (Rs. 78,800 - 2,09,200) for SLIO Level-7 (Rs. 44,900 - 1,42,400) for Asstt. Officer
salary_details.details: Senior Library & Information Officer (SLIO): Pay Level-12 (Rs. 78,800 - 2,09,200) Asstt. Library & Information Officer (Braille): Pay Level-7 (Rs. 44,900 - 1,42,400)

selection_process: Screening of applications Departmental Screening Committee Interview / Deputation process as applicable
how_to_apply: Applications complete in all respects should be sent to the LIO (Admn.), Delhi Public Library, Dr. Shyama Prasad Mukherjee Marg, Opp. Old Delhi Railway Station, Delhi-110006.
Applications must reach within 45 days from the date of publication of the notification.
important_instructions: No TA/DA will be paid for appearing in the selection process. Application fee is not refundable. DPL reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process. Applications received after due date or without supporting documents will not be considered.

faq.answer: Total 2 vacancies - 1 for Senior Library & Information Officer and 1 for Assistant Library & Information Officer (Braille).

Q4. What is the pay scale for Assistant Library & Information Officer (Braille)?

faq.answer: Application fee details are mentioned in the official notification.
